extra.reason: Implemented CRD-file YAML MVP with Cobra CLI, internal Structural schema adapter, and golden tests.
Implemented cluster discovery overview: client-go loading, deterministic resource/version overview, CLI no-file branch, and tests.
Overview YAML now uses the same terminal color support as schema YAML, with renderer coverage.
Overview versions now render as scalar for one version and latest-first YAML flow lists for multiple versions.
Colored YAML now renders mapping colons and flow-list punctuation with a light-grey syntax style.

Implemented discovery-backed RESTMapper selector resolution, OpenAPI v3 index/document fetching, native schema rendering through kubectl-doc Structural, and tests for selector grammar, ambiguity, OpenAPI v3 fetching, and representative apps/batch built-in fixtures.

Implemented internal example preservation for CRD and native OpenAPI schemas, YAML example rendering with default precedence, named example metadata, and tests for scalar, object, array, named, and default-over-example cases.

Validated the available embedded Kubernetes OpenAPI v3 fixtures through conversion and YAML rendering, added regression coverage for Deployment spec expansion, and implemented concrete native/schema extensions found during the pass: incomplete native OpenAPI fallback, generated single-ref allOf wrappers, and field-local examples.
Implemented --columns validation and Markdown paragraph wrapping for YAML description comments, defaulting to detected terminal width with fallback 80, with renderer and CLI tests.
False alarm: output was piped into glow, so stdout was not a terminal and the 80-column fallback was expected behavior. Use --columns to override when piping.
Implemented all-version Markdown pages with field anchors and initial GitHub/Fern renderer differences.
Added generated GitHub Markdown example, make gen/check-generated targets, GitHub CI, pinned golangci-lint v2 checks, and README/CONTRIBUTING docs.
Implemented -o kro SimpleSchema-style rendering for CRD and cluster schemas, all-version YAML streams, Markdown field-details opt-in, generated README example updates, and docs/tests.
README and docs/examples now use a richer DynamoGraphDeployment CRD fixture
Implemented static HTML output plus localhost browser mode with discovery landing, lazy schema routes, folding/search UI, and lifecycle tests.
Implemented CSS-based HTML YAML highlighting, schema-backed field details, grouped field selection, and search key handling.
Added tag-triggered GitHub Actions release workflow for Linux, macOS, and Windows binaries.
Added README installation section with Homebrew tap command.
Added Apache-2.0 license, Krew doc manifest draft, and license inclusion in release archives.
Added README Krew install command and commented future krew-index PR automation in the release workflow.

Implemented interactive overview filtering in TUI and web: plain typing filters groups/resources/versions/shortnames, highlights matches, preserves logical focus on Esc, supports group navigation over filtered rows, and has TUI/web tests.

Implemented interactive schema filtering in TUI and web: plain typing filters the logical schema tree including collapsed descendants, reveals matching paths, highlights matches, preserves focus and fold semantics on Esc/Enter, supports direct-match Tab navigation, and has renderer tests.

Implemented the interactive TUI/search/filter milestone: TUI and browser overview navigation, schema focus/folding, slash search separation, incremental overview and schema filtering, structured-metadata rendering, keyboard behavior, and regression tests are in place.
Enabled the release workflow job that renders doc.yaml and pushes a Krew manifest branch to the krew-index fork; PR creation remains commented for manual use.
Fixed in 59a00c8 by updating Node 24-compatible workflow actions and using direct authenticated git operations for krew-index updates.

Implemented markdown-fern as static Fern MDX with embedded schema payload, KubeSchemaDoc component invocation, default filtering with --disable-filtering, all-version tabs, structured field metadata/details, MDX escaping, and renderer/CLI/Dynamo CRD tests.
Fixed in d22994e by highlighting field names for all direct HTML filter matches.
Fixed in d22994e by clearing focus/top for empty TUI filter results and rendering an empty schema pane safely.
Fixed in 1b6378a by highlighting only visible query matches and removing description-only field-name highlight fallbacks.
Fixed in ca9e7ee by documenting path-aware schema filtering syntax and highlight behavior.
Fixed in aff15c9 by implementing path-aware schema filters in TUI and web schema views with tests and generated HTML updates.
Fixed in b1eddc7 by using a GitHub-compatible basic auth extraheader for krew-index git clone/fetch/push.
Created public sttts/homebrew-tap, published kubectl-doc 0.1.2 formula, verified brew install/test, and added release workflow automation for future formula updates.
Rendered root schema descriptions as standalone comments before apiVersion across tree-backed outputs and Kro, with tests and regenerated examples.
TUI filter highlighting now reapplies the active ANSI SGR sequence after highlighted matches so comment/key/scalar colors continue after the orange span.
Shared terminal styles and aligned TUI overview colors with YAML terminal colors.
Explicit YAML output now wraps comments to --columns or interactive terminal width.
Added -o jsonschema plain JSON Schema YAML output.
Cached web schema line/filter/comment state so large resources filter and wrap without quadratic scans or repeated comment reflows.
Fixed web filter highlight cleanup for multi-character queries, made filter overlay sticky, and added Escape quit behavior for explicit resource views.
Implemented indexed web filter visibility and match-only highlighting.
Implemented shared tokenized schema rendering, local Fern React preview harness, Dynamo consumption, and verified refreshed hosted Fern preview.
Implemented shared tokenized schema rendering, local Fern React preview harness, Dynamo consumption, and verified refreshed hosted Fern preview.

Fixed shared runtime lazy expansion for shallow Fern/web payloads: expanding collapsed metadata now loads and remounts the full schema while preserving expanded/filter state; added Fern browser regression coverage.
Fern component now hides the wrap control and keeps semantic comment wrapping enabled by default; added browser coverage for the no-toggle behavior.
Kept metadata descendants in shallow Fern payloads, hid collapsed Fern lines correctly, and covered metadata expansion without full sidecar fetch.
Fixed stale Fern selection cleanup and capture-phase fold click handling; propagated runtime adapter behavior to tests.

Fixed Fern full-schema preload/cache behavior, preserved fold/filter snapshots across lazy remounts, grouped root description lines, regenerated full Dynamo-scale fixtures, and propagated the consumer update to Dynamo.

Removed the checked-in Fern runtime copy, moved the reusable adapter to react/kubectl-doc, made make gen create the ignored runtime bundler artifact from the single web runtime source, and updated tests/docs for the generic React adapter.

Fixed filter-mode fold projection in shared web runtime and TUI: filtering now snapshots fold state, auto-reveals matching paths, keeps user fold overrides interactive, restores on Escape, and accepts/toggles correctly on Enter with regression coverage.
